name: Riyansh Singh
bio: I'm an aspiring engineer focused on building real-world skills in robotics, development, and creative tech.
My journey started with hands-on robotics using Arduino, sensors, and motors, where I built a sensor-based motor car (individual project) and worked on a robotic arm (group project).
Alongside hardware, I moved into web development, creating projects like Slice Frenzy, FunHub, and a Turf Tournament website.
I also explore video editing, design, and creative media — combining tech with creativity to build things that look as good as they work.
Outside tech, I was selected for a national-level football camp as goalkeeper & left defender — building discipline and teamwork alongside my technical skills.

projects.title: Turf Tournament
projects.desc: Modern sports tournament website UI with match scheduling and team management.

projects.title: FunHub
projects.desc: Creative experimental web features project packed with interactive UI experiments.

projects.title: Slice Frenzy
projects.desc: Interactive fruit-slicing game built with vanilla JavaScript — fast, fun, and addictive.

robotics.title: Sensor-Based Motor Car
robotics.desc: Individual project using proximity sensors + motor control via Arduino. Autonomous obstacle avoidance built from scratch.

robotics.title: Robotic Arm
robotics.desc: Group project focusing on multi-joint mechanical movement using servo motors and programmed motion sequences.

achievements.title: National Football Camp
achievements.desc: Selected as goalkeeper & left defender for national-level football camp.

achievements.title: Robotics Build Award
achievements.desc: Recognised for sensor-based motor car project.

achievements.title: Infosys AI Certification
achievements.desc: Completed Infosys Springboard AI & Generative AI courses.

achievements.title: 3 Live Web Projects
achievements.desc: Turf Tournament, FunHub and Slice Frenzy deployed and live.

journey.title: High School Completed
journey.sub: Academic foundation laid — time to build.

journey.title: Robotics & Web Development
journey.sub: Built sensor cars, robotic arms, web projects & AI certifications.

journey.sub_after: Officially a Computer Science engineer in the making.
